sourceStatuses.title: ONIA 2026 national + Lot
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported from official ONIA 2026 national results, participant-sheet recovery data, mlcompete final leaderboards, and Lot scoreboards.

sourceStatuses.title: ONIA International results 2024-2025
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported from official international scoreboards where available, with the ONIA Hall of Fame preserving medal context.

sourceStatuses.title: IAIO 2024 official results
sourceStatuses.detail: Place and score imported from the official IAIO 2024 scoreboard.

sourceStatuses.title: ROAI 2026
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported from the official ROAI 2026 task/results pages, national final PDFs, Baraj and national Nitro judge standings, and Lot IAIO/CEOAI ranking PDFs.

sourceStatuses.title: ROAI 2025 Lot
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported from the official ROAI 2025 Lot task/results page and final IOAI/IAIO ranking PDFs.

sourceStatuses.title: ROAI 2025 national
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported from official ROAI 2025 task/results pages, class final PDFs, qualified participant lists, Nitro judge leaderboards, and recovered anonymized national scoreboard rows.

sourceStatuses.title: ONIA 2026 mlcompete usernames
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported public final leaderboard usernames from ONIA 2026 national and Lot mlcompete pages; profile-backed pairings are added only when they match a known real name without ambiguity.

sourceStatuses.title: ROAI judge usernames
sourceStatuses.detail: Imported final leaderboard usernames from ROAI 2025/2026 national and 2026 Baraj stages; added only where there was no ambiguity.
